markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss and provide feedback on calibration articles for Swoogo's content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/jn9cpeB7aBzXCGkrBfTuxirYqzs7AiNt?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [The initial calibration articles felt too basic/101-level and didn't align well with Swoogo's brand voice and target audience](https://fathom.video/share/jn9cpeB7aBzXCGkrBfTuxirYqzs7AiNt?tab=summary&timestamp=134.0)
  - [Molly will provide examples of articles that better match the desired tone and content level](https://fathom.video/share/jn9cpeB7aBzXCGkrBfTuxirYqzs7AiNt?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [The 101-level content can be used for building domain authority, but the main focus should be on content tailored to Swoogo's ideal customer profile (ICP)](https://fathom.video/share/jn9cpeB7aBzXCGkrBfTuxirYqzs7AiNt?tab=summary&timestamp=155.0)
  - [There will be an iterative, collaborative process for reviewing and refining the content strategy week-over-week](https://fathom.video/share/jn9cpeB7aBzXCGkrBfTuxirYqzs7AiNt?tab=summary&timestamp=344.0)

## Topics

### Initial Calibration Articles Feedback

  - [Articles felt too 101-level, explaining basic concepts like "what is a hybrid event"](https://fathom.video/share/jn9cpeB7aBzXCGkrBfTuxirYqzs7AiNt?tab=summary&timestamp=134.0)
  - [Content tone was slightly off from Swoogo's brand voice](https://fathom.video/share/jn9cpeB7aBzXCGkrBfTuxirYqzs7AiNt?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Disconnect between the very broad/beginner audience targeted and Swoogo's ICP of event marketers](https://fathom.video/share/jn9cpeB7aBzXCGkrBfTuxirYqzs7AiNt?tab=summary&timestamp=226.0)

### Content Strategy Approach

  - [Use 101-level content to build domain authority by targeting broad, top-of-funnel keywords](https://fathom.video/share/jn9cpeB7aBzXCGkrBfTuxirYqzs7AiNt?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [But focus main content efforts on middle/bottom-of-funnel topics tailored to ICP's interests](https://fathom.video/share/jn9cpeB7aBzXCGkrBfTuxirYqzs7AiNt?tab=summary&timestamp=191.0)
  - [Iterative process - publish batches, get feedback, refine approach for next batch](https://fathom.video/share/jn9cpeB7aBzXCGkrBfTuxirYqzs7AiNt?tab=summary&timestamp=344.0)
  - [Discard off-target articles, replace with better aligned ones](https://fathom.video/share/jn9cpeB7aBzXCGkrBfTuxirYqzs7AiNt?tab=summary&timestamp=290.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Molly to send examples of articles with desired tone and content level](https://fathom.video/share/jn9cpeB7aBzXCGkrBfTuxirYqzs7AiNt?tab=summary&timestamp=502.0)
  - [Recalibrate and update this week's remaining article drafts based on feedback](https://fathom.video/share/jn9cpeB7aBzXCGkrBfTuxirYqzs7AiNt?tab=summary&timestamp=378.0)
  - [Review new batch of drafted articles next week to align on publishing cadence](https://fathom.video/share/jn9cpeB7aBzXCGkrBfTuxirYqzs7AiNt?tab=summary&timestamp=618.0)
